outputPreview: Combat tick/damage logic is governed by `Global.combat._trigger_damage` (centralized damage routing), entity-specific `_core_logic_tick` loops for targeting cadence (`drone_flat.gd`, `scanilus.gd`, `necrotilus.gd`, `bastionlus.gd`), and projectile/burst spawning within those ticks. Targeting files include `entities/drone_flat/drone_flat.gd` (mode states, target acquisition, bookkeeping), `entities/laser/Las8F38.tmp` (laser targeting cadence), and boss files for their specific attack patterns. Sh
